channel.title: Tao An · Articles
channel.description: Web-native research notes by Tao An: interactive figures, permanent URLs, citation metadata.

item.title: The Citation Ledger Is Fine. The Citation Currency Is Dying.
item.description: Citation bundles a ledger (registration, priority) and a currency (reputation) in one act. LLM reader-side consumption is splitting them.

item.title: We Checked All 209,985 Citations in ACL 2026
item.description: Companion note to the Tuto audit report: fabricated references are a rounding error; unsupported claim citations are not.

item.title: The Missing Cost Term
item.description: Interactive companion to When Should the Agent Speak?: twenty years of interruptibility research, and agents that arrived without the price term.

item.title: What the Model Isn't About to Say
item.description: Interactive companion to Registers, Not Plans: why only context registers, not content plans, survive a strict readout test.

item.title: What Structured Memory Forgets
item.description: Interactive companion to It's Fidelity, Not Structure: why extraction loses to verbatim chunks at write time.

item.title: How Much the Model Agrees with Itself
item.description: Interactive companion to The Preference Centroid: sample clouds, judge-predicted dispersion, alignment as amplifier.

item.title: What I Got Wrong About LLM Memory
item.description: Cognitive Workspace argued for actively curated memory; a later ablation showed curation is lossy deletion.
